title: elodes nummularia
intro: Elodes nummularia, also known as the coin-leaved elodea, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Elodes nummularia include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Elodes nummularia can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional remedies for its purported wound-healing and antiseptic properties.
